commands.name: proofread-selection

preferences.name: customPrompt
preferences.title: Custom Prompt
preferences.description: The instruction prompt to send to Copilot
preferences.default: Please proofread the following text for grammar, spelling, and clarity. Suggest improvements if necessary:

commands.name: quick-ask
commands.title: Quick Ask Copilot
commands.description: Quickly ask Copilot anything directly from the Raycast bar

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
